first_impression_why: A has a dramatically striking hero image with bold industrial imagery that immediately signals a serious, well-funded deeptech venture.
reasoning: A wins convincingly — the dramatic visual storytelling and bold headline ('The next century of nuclear power') immediately communicate ambition, seriousness, and scale. The imagery is premium and distinctive rather than generic. B has better quantifiable trust signals (download metrics, GitHub stars) but A's visual impact is simply in a different league. These are very different companies targeting very different audiences, so the comparison is somewhat apples-to-oranges.
